Safir 1

OBD Information

Protocol: ISO8
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: 7A
Func Name: Injection

Requests

[
  {
    "minbytes": 30,
    "sentbytes": "3152",
    "name": "APV3 - Ctrl parametres",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "mode du diagnostic APV3": {
        "firstbyte": 1,
        "ref": true

    },

        "firstbyte": 30,

        "ref": true
